$comment: Default template catalog for Casals. These WASMs are uploaded to the file-registry and authorized on the backend by scripts/seed.py. Sheets reference them by `key` (the authorized-WASM key). This is separate from any sheet on purpose: the catalog is the set of runnable artifacts; a sheet only wires existing artifacts into an orchestra. A `frontend`-kind template may carry an `asset` (a file uploaded to the registry); Casals uploads it into each stand built from that template after install, so the certified-assets canister actually serves a page.

templates.description: DFINITY certified assets canister serving a hello-world page.
